name: UKG Pro & Ready Workforce Management API
what_it_does: UKG (Ultimate Kronos Group) REST API for workforce management and HCM platform. Enables AI agents to manage workforce scheduling and shift optimization automation, handle time and attendance data collection and approval workflows, access payroll processing and gross-to-net calculation, retrieve workforce analytics and labor cost reporting, manage employee self-service and manager workflow automation, handle absence and leave management, access compliance reporting for labor law requirements, retrieve talent management and performance data, manage organizational hierarchy and job data, and integrate workforce management with ERP, finance, and operational planning systems.
use_cases: Optimizing workforce scheduling from labor management agents
Automating time and attendance approval from manager workflow agents
Processing payroll and labor cost reporting from finance automation agents
Managing absence and leave workflows from HR operations agents
not_for: Very small businesses without enterprise workforce management complexity
Simple payroll without advanced scheduling and labor compliance needs
Global EOR without US-centric workforce management foundation
best_when: A mid-market or enterprise (particularly in healthcare, retail, manufacturing) using UKG Pro or Ready wants AI agents to automate workforce scheduling, time and attendance, payroll, labor compliance, and operational analytics.
avoid_when: LEGAL+COMPLIANCE RISK: Automated workforce scheduling must comply with predictive scheduling laws, overtime regulations, and break requirements by jurisdiction. Automated payroll has IRS and state tax consequences. Labor law compliance varies significantly by state and industry.

auth.notes: UKG uses OAuth 2.0 for API access. Service account credentials with workforce, payroll, and HR scopes. UKG Developer portal with API documentation. Webhooks for time, scheduling, and HR events. UKG Marketplace for partner integrations. Separate APIs for UKG Pro (formerly UltiPro) and UKG Ready (formerly Kronos Workforce Ready).

pricing.paid_tiers: Annual subscription per employee per module; custom enterprise pricing
pricing.notes: Lowell, Massachusetts and Weston, Florida. Founded 2020 (merger of Ultimate Software and Kronos). Private. $3B+ annual revenue. 70,000+ customers globally. Strong in healthcare, retail, manufacturing, and hospitality. UKG Pro for mid-enterprise HCM, UKG Ready for SMB workforce management. Competes with ADP, Ceridian, and Workday.

performance.rate_limits: Rate limits per OAuth application; bulk data APIs available

known_agent_gotchas: LEGAL RISK: Automated scheduling must handle predictive scheduling laws and overtime rules by jurisdiction — automated violation creates penalties
Two separate product APIs — UKG Pro and UKG Ready have different API surfaces; verify which product is in use
No public MCP server — OAuth2 REST API requiring customer relationship
Healthcare focus — UKG has strong healthcare vertical features; APIs may expose clinical scheduling specifics
UKG Marketplace partner approval — integration apps require UKG review and certification
Complex scheduling data model — shift bids, self-scheduling, and manager overrides have interdependencies
agent_readiness.security_notes: Workforce management and HCM. SOC1, SOC2, ISO27001, GDPR, HIPAA. OAuth2. US/EU/CA. Employee time, scheduling, and payroll data.

security_score_components.security_notes: Workforce management and HCM. SOC1, SOC2, ISO27001, GDPR, HIPAA. OAuth2. US/EU/CA. Employee and workforce data.
